response_text:
Here's a sample 7-day healthy meal plan that includes a variety of nutritious foods:

**Monday**

* Breakfast: Oatmeal with banana, almond butter, and a splash of low-fat milk (300 calories)
* Lunch: Grilled chicken breast with roasted vegetables (broccoli, carrots, bell peppers) and quinoa (400 calories)
* Dinner: Baked salmon with sweet potato, green beans, and a side salad with vinaigrette dressing (500 calories)
* Snack: Apple slices with peanut butter (150 calories)

**Tuesday**

* Breakfast: Greek yogurt with berries, granola, and a sprinkle of spinach (350 calories)
* Lunch: Turkey and avocado wrap with mixed greens and whole wheat wrap (450 calories)
* Dinner: Grilled turkey breast with roasted Brussels sprouts, brown rice, and a side of whole grain bread (550 calories)
* Snack: Carrot sticks with hummus (100 calories)

**Wednesday**

* Breakfast: Smoothie bowl with banana, spinach, almond milk, and almond butter topping (350 calories)
* Lunch: Grilled chicken breast with mixed greens salad, cherry tomatoes, cucumber, and balsamic vinaigrette (400 calories)
* Dinner: Slow cooker lentil soup with whole grain bread and a side salad (500 calories)
* Snack: Hard-boiled egg and cherry tomatoes (120 calories)

**Thursday**

* Breakfast: Avocado toast on whole grain bread with scrambled eggs and cherry tomatoes (300 calories)
* Lunch: Grilled chicken Caesar salad (400 calories)
* Dinner: Baked chicken breast with roasted asparagus, quinoa, and a side salad (500 calories)
* Snack: Rice cakes with almond butter and banana slices (150 calories)

**Friday**

* Breakfast: Overnight oats with banana, almond milk, and chia seeds (300 calories)
* Lunch: Turkey and cheese sandwich on whole grain bread with carrot sticks and hummus (450 calories)
* Dinner: Grilled shrimp with roasted bell peppers, quinoa, and a side salad (500 calories)
* Snack: Greek yogurt with honey and almonds (150 calories)

**Saturday**

* Breakfast: Whole grain waffles with fresh berries, yogurt, and granola (350 calories)
* Lunch: Grilled chicken breast with mixed greens and whole wheat pita (400 calories)
* Dinner: Baked chicken breast with roasted broccoli, brown rice, and a side salad (500 calories)
* Snack: Apple slices with cheddar cheese (120 calories)

**Sunday**

* Breakfast: Breakfast burrito with scrambled eggs, black beans, and avocado (350 calories)
* Lunch: Grilled chicken breast with mixed greens and whole wheat wrap (400 calories)
* Dinner: Slow cooker chili with quinoa and a side salad (550 calories)
* Snack: Rice crackers with hummus and cucumber slices (100 calories)

**Tips and Reminders**

* Drink at least 8 cups of water per day
* Incorporate physical activity, such as walking or jogging, for at least 30 minutes per day
* Choose whole grains, lean proteins, and a variety of colorful fruits and vegetables
* Limit processed and sugary foods
* Eat mindfully and stop when satisfied, rather than stuffed

This meal plan provides approximately 1800-2000 calories per day, with a balance of protein, healthy fats, and complex carbohydrates. Feel free to adjust the portion sizes and ingredients based on your individual needs and preferences. Consult with a healthcare professional or registered dietitian for personalized nutrition advice.
